personal.name: Shujat Ali Shah
personal.title: Computer Engineering Student
personal.summary: I'm Shujat Ali Shah, a 3rd-year Computer Engineering student passionate about solving real-world problems through technology. I have a strong foundation in programming (C, C++, C#, Python) and web development (HTML, CSS), along with hands-on experience in embedded systems, microcontrollers, and circuit design using tools like Proteus. I am deeply interested in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Cybersecurity. Driven by continuous learning, I aim to build innovative, efficient, and secure solutions.

portal.name: Overview
portal.tagline: Multi-disciplinary tech enthusiast blending software development, hardware designing, intelligent systems, and security.

software.name: Software Engineering
software.tagline: Developing robust backend applications, script automations, and responsive web systems.

hardware.name: Hardware Designing
hardware.tagline: Designing circuit schematics, simulating microcontroller actions, and implementing hardware-software integrations.

ai-ml.name: AI-ML
ai-ml.tagline: Engineering intelligent systems, training predictive models, and building real-time computer vision applications.

cybersecurity.name: Cyber-security
cybersecurity.tagline: Analyzing threat vectors, assessing risk, and implementing security best practices.

experiences.description: Developed 'Kynova,' a rule-based AI chatbot, engineering explicit programmatic decision trees to simulate natural human interaction. Trained and optimized machine learning classification models, including K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), Naïve Bayes, and Logistic Regression, to evaluate predictive performance. Deployed computer vision and optical character recognition (OCR) solutions utilizing OpenCV and Tesseract for automated image and text data extraction. Built 'Gesture Canvas,' applying real-time computer vision algorithms to track and map hand gestures for interactive applications.

Responsible for driving revenue growth and exceeding sales targets. Leveraged strong communication and negotiation skills to build client relationships, understand their needs, and present tailored solutions. Role involved active listening, persuasive selling, and closing deals to contribute directly to the company's success.

projects.title: Hospital Management System
projects.description: Developed a comprehensive hospital management system leveraging Python and HTML to streamline patient registration, appointment scheduling, and billing processes. This project enhanced operational efficiency and reduced administrative overhead.

projects.title: Gesture Canvas
projects.description: A real-time computer vision application that applies advanced tracking algorithms to map and translate hand gestures onto an interactive digital canvas. Created for seamless human-computer interaction.

projects.title: Kynova AI Chatbot
projects.description: Designed a conversational AI utilizing rule-based state trees and decision graphs to simulate natural, context-aware dialogues. Optimized with machine learning classification backends.

projects.title: Smart Traffic Automation
projects.description: Designed and simulated a smart traffic control circuit using Proteus. Programmed microcontrollers in C++ to optimize traffic light schedules based on mock sensor inputs, minimizing congestion.

education.description: Coursework provides a strong foundation in computer science principles, software development, and engineering practices. Actively engaged in academic projects and core laboratories focusing on hardware description languages, computer systems architecture, and software development.

certifications.title: Google Cybersecurity Foundations Certificate
certifications.description: Gained critical knowledge in threat analysis, risk assessment, network security protocols, incident response, and security best practices.

certifications.title: Crash Course on Python
certifications.description: Demonstrated foundational programming, script automation, and algorithmic problem-solving skills.

certifications.title: Using Python to Interact with the Operating System
certifications.description: Proficiency in operating system automation, file management, subprocessing, and scripting process executions.

certifications.title: Configuration Management and the Cloud
certifications.description: Validation of skills in cloud infrastructure management, automation scripts, and provisioning tools.

certifications.title: Introduction to Git and GitHub
certifications.description: Credentialed in source control management, team collaboration, branch merges, and pull-request workflows.
